title: This MCP makes Hermes Agent 10x more powerful
summary: David Ondrej demonstrates Apify MCP Connectors integrated with Hermes Agent, claiming a 10x improvement in agent power. The connector enables broader functionality through Model Context Protocol integration.
writeup: David Ondrej demonstrates integrating Apify MCP Connectors with Hermes Agent, claiming the pairing makes the agent ten times more powerful. The connector uses Model Context Protocol to extend the agent's functionality through API integration. The video covers how the MCP layer broadens what Hermes Agent can do.
